'''鈭歭-t-ch''' ('''kalatach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loc|loc]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loc|loc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kalatach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilatach|thilatach]] || [[word:jilatach|jilatach]] || [[word:shilatach|shilatach]] || [[word:kilatach|kilatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulatach|thuthulatach]] || [[word:jujulatach|jujulatach]] || [[word:shushulatach|shushulatach]] || [[word:kukulatach|kukulatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulatach|thulatach]] || [[word:julatach|julatach]] || [[word:shulatach|shulatach]] || [[word:kulatach|kulatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulatach|thulatach]] || [[word:julatach|julatach]] || [[word:shulatach|shulatach]] || [[word:kulatach|kulatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelatach|thelatach]] || [[word:jelatach|jelatach]] || [[word:shelatach|shelatach]] || [[word:kelatach|kelatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholatach|thotholatach]] || [[word:jojolatach|jojolatach]] || [[word:shosholatach|shosholatach]] || [[word:kokolatach|kokolatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholatach|tholatach]] || [[word:jolatach|jolatach]] || [[word:sholatach|sholatach]] || [[word:kolatach|kolatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholatach|tholatach]] || [[word:jolatach|jolatach]] || [[word:sholatach|sholatach]] || [[word:kolatach|kolatach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]] || [[word:latach|latach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙latach|th忙latach]] || [[word:j忙latach|j忙latach]] || [[word:sh忙latach|sh忙latach]] || [[word:k忙latach|k忙latach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalatach|thathalatach]] || [[word:jajalatach|jajalatach]] || [[word:shashalatach|shashalatach]] || [[word:kakalatach|kakalatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalatach|thalatach]] || [[word:jalatach|jalatach]] || [[word:shalatach|shalatach]] || [[word:kalatach|kalatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalatach|thalatach]] || [[word:jalatach|jalatach]] || [[word:shalatach|shalatach]] || [[word:kalatach|kalatach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalatach|shalatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalatach|goshalatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalatach|gokishalatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalatachn眉|shalatachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalatachnkn眉|goshalatachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatachn眉|gokishalatachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalatachsh毛|shalatachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalatachnksh毛|goshalatachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalatachsh毛|gokishalatachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatachro|shalatachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatachnkro|goshalatachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatachro|gokishalatachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatachmu|shalatachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatachnkmu|goshalatachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatachmu|gokishalatachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalatachsher|shalatachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalatachnksher|goshalatachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalatachsher|gokishalatachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalatachng|shalatachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalatachnkng|goshalatachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalatachng|gokishalatachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalatachya|shalatachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalatachnkya|goshalatachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalatachya|gokishalatachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalatachyam|shalatachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalatachnkyam|goshalatachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalatachyam|gokishalatachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalatachn眉sh毛|shalatachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalatachnkn眉sh毛|goshalatachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalatachn眉sh毛|gokishalatachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatachn眉ro|shalatachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatachnkn眉ro|goshalatachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatachn眉ro|gokishalatachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatachn眉mu|shalatachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatachnkn眉mu|goshalatachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatachn眉mu|gokishalatachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalatachsh毛n眉|shalatachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalatachnksh毛n眉|goshalatachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatachsh毛n眉|gokishalatachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatachsh毛ro|shalatachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatachnksh毛ro|goshalatachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatachsh毛ro|gokishalatachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatachsh毛mu|shalatachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatachnksh毛mu|goshalatachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatachsh毛mu|gokishalatachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalatachron眉|shalatachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalatachnkron眉|goshalatachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatachron眉|gokishalatachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalatachrosh毛|shalatachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalatachnkrosh毛|goshalatachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalatachrosh毛|gokishalatachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalatachromu|shalatachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalatachnkromu|goshalatachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalatachromu|gokishalatachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalatachmun眉|shalatachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalatachnkmun眉|goshalatachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalatachmun眉|gokishalatachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalatachmush毛|shalatachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalatachnkmush毛|goshalatachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalatachmush毛|gokishalatachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalatachmuro|shalatachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalatachnkmuro|goshalatachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalatachmuro|gokishalatachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
